design_principles: Redacted Document Aesthetic: Heavy use of typography, stark contrast, and visible structural elements (borders, grid lines).
Color Constraints: Exclusively use the defined palette (Cream, Navy, Red). Do not introduce grays or other colors.
Typography as UI: Rely on font pairing (Serif + Mono) rather than background colors or cards to establish hierarchy.
Data-Test IDs: Every interactive element MUST have a descriptive data-testid.

fonts.usage: Translations, labels, tags, and the Decoded stamp

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-serif font-bold text-[#0B1F2A] tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-5xl font-serif font-bold text-[#0B1F2A] tracking-tight leading-tight

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.details: Sticky top nav. bg-[#F1EFE7]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b-2 border-[#0B1F2A]. Logo 'DECODED' in heavy serif. CTA 'Request Access' (border-2 border-[#0B1F2A] text-[#0B1F2A] hover:bg-[#0B1F2A] hover:text-[#F1EFE7] px-6 py-2 transition-colors font-mono text-sm uppercase).

components.name: Hero Section
components.details: Massive H1 headline 'What they said. What it actually means.'. Short description below in large Serif. Primary CTA 'Decode a Transcript' (bg-[#C1442D] text-[#F1EFE7] hover:bg-[#A33925] px-8 py-4 font-mono uppercase tracking-wide transition-colors). Clicking CTA scrolls smoothly to Footer email signup.

components.name: Centerpiece Document Card
components.details: A physical-looking paper document container (bg-[#F1EFE7] border-2 border-[#0B1F2A] shadow-[12px_12px_0px_#0B1F2A] p-8 md:p-16 relative w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto). Contains 3 examples stacked vertically with borders between them. For each: corporate jargon in Serif with a red strikethrough (line-through decoration-[#C1442D] decoration-4). Below it, label 'TRANSLATION →' in red Mono. Below that, plain English translation in Mono. Include a rotated 'DECODED' stamp graphic (absolute top-8 right-8 border-4 border-[#C1442D] text-[#C1442D] font-mono font-bold text-3xl px-6 py-2 rotate-[15deg] opacity-90 mix-blend-multiply).

components.name: Features Section
components.details: 3-column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-12 border-t-2 border-[#0B1F2A] pt-16 mt-20). Columns: '01 Detect', '02 Translate', '03 Score'. Each has a mono numeric label in red ('01'), followed by a serif heading, and serif body text describing the feature. Top of each column can have a top-border to feel like a document table.

components.name: Social Proof Section
components.details: Centered Serif headline: 'Trusted by those who move markets'. Below it, a flex wrap row of audience labels (pills/tags). Audience labels: 'Buy-Side Analysts', 'Fintwit', 'Newsletter Writers', 'Equity Research'. Pill style: border-2 border-[#0B1F2A] text-[#0B1F2A] font-mono text-sm md:text-base px-6 py-2 rounded-full.

components.name: Footer / Email Signup
components.details: Dark mode section. bg-[#0B1F2A] text-[#F1EFE7] py-24. Large Serif heading 'Get early access to Decoded'. Form with email input (bg-transparent border-b-2 border-[#F1EFE7] text-[#F1EFE7] placeholder:text-[#F1EFE7]/50 focus:outline-none py-3 text-xl font-mono w-full max-w-md) and a red CTA button 'Notify Me' (bg-[#C1442D] text-[#F1EFE7] font-mono uppercase px-8 py-4 mt-8 block w-fit hover:bg-[#A33925] transition-colors).

motion_and_animations.page_load: Subtle fade up for hero elements using Framer Motion (initial={{opacity:0, y:20}} animate={{opacity:1, y:0}}).
motion_and_animations.document_card: On hover, the shadow extends slightly and card translates (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_animations.stamp: Stamp fades and stamps down (scale from 1.5 to 1, rotate from 0 to 15deg) when the document card comes into viewport (whileInView).
motion_and_animations.scrolling: Use smooth scrolling for anchor links (e.g. Hero CTA to Footer).

developer_instructions.styling: Use strict Tailwind arbitrary values or add the provided colors to tailwind.config.js (`bg-paper`, `text-navy`, `accent-red`).
developer_instructions.fonts: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'IBM Plex Mono' from Google Fonts in index.css. Apply globally where necessary.
developer_instructions.api: Create a FastAPI endpoint (`POST /api/subscribe`) that accepts an email and stores it in MongoDB (using motor/pymongo). The React frontend should submit to this endpoint and display a success toast using Sonner. Provide graceful error handling.
developer_instructions.libraries: framer-motion for interactions, sonner for toasts, lucide-react for minimal icons if strictly needed (though typography is preferred).
